description: Vital Recorder is open with the surgical case file '0001.vital' loaded. The current view shows only default waveform tracks. Your task is to add three specific physiological parameter tracks to the waveform display to monitor the patient's hemodynamics and depth of anesthesia: Solar8000 / ART_MBP (Mean Arterial Blood Pressure), Primus / ETCO2 (End-Tidal CO2), and BIS / BIS (Bispectral Index). The final display must show these three tracks alongside any existing ones.
